act_title: *DECLARATION OF AN AREA IN THE BINTULU DISTRICT TO BE A FEDERAL PORT ACT 1979
content:
4.   On the Minister so declaring the area to be a federal port under
section  3,  the  responsibility  for  the  development,  control
and administration of that  area shall be transferred to and vest in
the Federal Government.
Federal Government to take all steps and measures and do all
matters  and things necessary for, incidental to or connected
with discharge of  its  responsibility

act_title: *DECLARATION OF AN AREA IN THE BINTULU DISTRICT TO BE A FEDERAL PORT ACT 1979
content:
5.  The Federal Government may take all steps and measures and
do all matters and things that are necessary for, incidental to or
connected with the discharge of its responsibility under this Act.

act_title: *DECLARATION OF AN AREA IN THE BINTULU DISTRICT TO BE A FEDERAL PORT ACT 1979
content:
1. This Act may be cited as the Declaration of an Area in the
Bintulu District to be a Federal Port Act 1979.
Interpretation

act_title: *DECLARATION OF AN AREA IN THE BINTULU DISTRICT TO BE A FEDERAL PORT ACT 1979
content:
2. In this Act, “Minister” means the Federal Minister charged
with responsibility for ports and harbours.
Declaration of area to be federal port by Minister
3.
The Minister may with effect from such date as he may
specify, by order in the Gazette, declare an area in the Bintulu
District in the Fourth Division of  the State of Sarawak to be a
federal port to be known as Bintulu Port.
6
Laws of Malaysia                        ACT 217
Federal Government to be responsible for development, control
and administration of area declared to be federal port
